name: Assist
description: Irisy's default companion mode. Active when no other keycap is invoked. Reads the whole vault; writes session state under keycaps/builtin-assist/.

seed.content_inline:
# Assist (Irisy's default companion)

This is Irisy's default conversational keycap. Her chat history, saved replies, and session state live here.

## Customizing Irisy's voice

Drop a file called `persona.md` into this folder to override `assets/persona.md`. The runtime prefers your vault copy.
